summary: Original company went bankrupt; brand acquired and continues online.
AIM instant messaging service shut down in 2017.
Legacy BlackBerry OS devices ended; brand licensed later on Android.
Video rental chain largely closed after bankruptcy; one store remains as novelty.
Bookseller that filed for bankruptcy and closed in 2011.

Cult-favorite striped chewing gum with mascot Yipes the Zebra; discontinued by Ferrara in 2024 after more than 50 years.
Metal-tipped backyard game banned by the CPSC in 1988 after more than 6100 injuries and three child deaths.
Family-friendly LEGO MMO that ran from 2010 to 2012; attracted nearly 2 million players but could not convert enough to paid subscribers.
